mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY ( PERSON_NO, PERSON_ID, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, SEXCODE, DOB, NATION_CODE, NATIONALITY_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, WEDDING_DATE, IDCARD_NO, IDCARD_START_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, HOME_ADDRESS, EMAIL, EMAIL_SECOND, REG_PLACE, OFFICE_PHONE, HOME_PHONE, CELLPHONE, COMPANY_PHONE, HOUSE_TP, RESIDENTIAL_DISTINCTION, EXIST_SINGLE, SING_ID, RELIGION, POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, CV_UPDATE_STATUS, ARMY_OR_NOT, OBSTACLE_OR_NOT, APPLY_TYPE, ESS_TYPE_CODE, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{personNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{finalDegreeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sexCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{dob, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationalityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{weddingDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{idcardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcardStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuingAuthority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homeAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cellphone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{houseTp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{residentialDistinction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{existSingle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{singId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{religion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{politicalOutlook, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cvUpdateStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{armyOrNot, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obstacleOrNot, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{essTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT PERSON_NO, PERSON_ID, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS FINAL_DEGREE_NAME, SEXCODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SEX_NAME, TO_CHAR(DOB,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DOB, NATION_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(NATION_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NATION_NAME, NATIONALITY_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(NATIONALITY_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NATIONALITY_NAME, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MARITAL_STATUS_NAME, TO_CHAR(WEDDING_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS WEDDING_DATE, IDCARD_NO, IDCARD_START_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, HOME_ADDRESS, EMAIL, EMAIL_SECOND, OFFICE_PHONE, HOME_PHONE, CELLPHONE, COMPANY_PHONE, HOUSE_TP, RELIGION, POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, ARMY_OR_NOT, OBSTACLE_OR_NOT, APPLY_TYPE, ESS_TYPE_CODE, ACTIVITY FROM HR_PERSONAL_INFO_APPLY WHERE PERSON_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
